headline: Arista Networks AI Outlook Lifts 2026 Goals But Concentration Risks Grow
summary: Arista Networks (NYSE:ANET) has raised its 2026 revenue outlook, citing stronger than expected demand tied to AI infrastructure. Management now expects AI related sales, particularly from its AI Center business, to contribute the bulk of incremental revenue in 2026. The company also highlighted customer concentration and deferred hardware revenue as key factors that could affect how results are recognized. Arista enters this updated guidance phase with a strong multiyear share price record,...
